objective: Refactor trigonometric/transcendental shaders into responsibility subfolders while preserving shader asset declarations and catalog references. Complete topology: elementary_trig owns circular trig formulas and Mandelbrot/Julia variants; hyperbolic owns sinh/cosh/tanh formulas and variants; exponential_iteration owns exp/superexp/tetration iteration formulas; special_functions owns zeta/eta/Jacobi/Mittag-Leffler/Weierstrass formulas. Shader files remain pure GLSL assets exposed through pubspec and escape_time_catalog asset strings; subfolders must never know about UI, app orchestration, or Dart module registration beyond asset paths.
completedSlices: Added/kept focused shader asset existence/declaration test for trigonometric_and_transcendental public behavior.
Moved all 35 root shader assets into responsibility subfolders matching existing pubspec/catalog asset paths.
Verified no stale flat trigonometric_and_transcendental shader asset references remain.
